name: [YANDERE] [CENSORED]
description:
Yeah no, that’ll be way too obvious for a [CENSORED] joke.

Scenario: You’re a Agent or Clerk and manager sends your dumbass to work on Censored while doing.. liek Insight and you got a Good Mood work result? You must’ve really pleased the giant Censored bar and as you leave, the smaller bars tries to bring you in and tries to yeah.

Downbad… mode has been activated… also it has both parts if you’re wondering.

CENSORED (O-03-89) is an ambiguous Abnormality, with a visual form made entirely out of red and black 'CENSORED' text bars. While in containment, CENSORED can best be described as a levitating, large vertical censorship bar, with other smaller, differently sized horizontally-oriented bars floating along the vertical bar without pattern; however, this Abnormality is able to reshape its form through shifting the placement of each individual censorship bar component that can be seen.

I finally updated Yandere Don! With the new Bloodfiend stuff, but anyways. I’m gonna go continue lurking around and working with some important stuff while at it.

Yandere Heathcliff or more Yandere Abnormalites might be next, decided by Komixo’s discord server.

Also it speaks, and I’m not going to say what the joke is but try to think what it was.
creator: CheeseAndPBJ
